== Notes for [[Item:Q102492|Q102492]] ==

Exilarch Kahana II ben Zutra beni David was Exilarch (Exilarch [Hebrew: ראש גלות Rosh Galut, Aramaic: ריש גלותא Reish Galuta lit. "head of the exile", Greek: Æchmalotarcha], referring to the leaders of the Diaspora Jewish community following the deportation of the population of Judah into Babylonian exile after the destruction of the kingdom of Judah) in Babylonia between 455 and 465.

See "My Lines"

( http://homepages.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~cousin/html/p111.htm#i13315 )

from Compiler: R. B. Stewart, Evans, GA

( http://homepages.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~cousin/html/index.htm )
--------------------
Mar Kahana II Maremar,

occupation: Exilarch 455-465,

son of Mar Zutra I and nn to: nn

Son: ) Haninai (Huna VI), occupation: Exilarch 485-508 to: nn

He was Exilarch in Baghdad from 455 to 465.

He was Exilarch in Baghdad from 455 to 465.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000003188071238

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
